errors.name: WorkoutTooSoon
errors.msg: Muscles need rest. You must wait at least 10 seconds between verified workouts.

errors.name: ProtocolNotComplete
errors.msg: Protocol not complete. You cannot withdraw your stake until all committed days are processed.

errors.name: DeadlineNotPassed
errors.msg: The guillotine has not dropped yet. The lifter still has time in their window.

errors.name: MissedDeadline
errors.msg: You missed your window. Your stake is bleeding and awaiting liquidation.

errors.name: UnauthorizedTreasury
errors.msg: Security Alert: Slashed funds can only be routed to the official ForgeFi Treasury.
